title: Lots o Spheal [Cobblemon addon]
description: An addon that adds more versions of Spheal to Cobblemon.
body:
Lots o Spheal is an addon for Cobblemon that adds Sphusions to the game. The point of this addon is to add cute squishy versions of Pkmn to catch and battle with. The current list consists of Sphusions like Sphitto (Ditto), Sphutiefly (Cutiefly) and Spheal fusions of the Kanto starters. This addon can also be used as a resource pack to change the Spheal model!
Updates after 2.1 can be used without Cobblemon as the structures in the addon still generate!
